_comment: Optional deterministic enforcement layer for Claude Code. Merge the hooks block into ~/.claude/settings.json (or a project .claude/settings.json). The soul's Red Flags rely on the model remembering to self-check; a Stop hook fires every turn regardless of context length. Keep the messages short — they are reminders, not rules; the rules live in soul.md.

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' '[fable-soul] Before ending: no done-claim without a run, no promise of work you could do now, no hedge word on a checkable claim, no unconfirmed problem reported as a finding.'
